dialogue_text: I have brought a strange creature wearing the metal of a Thark whom it is my pleasure to have battle with a wild thoat at the great games.

dialogue_text: He will die as Bar Comas, your jeddak, sees fit, if at all,
source_excerpt: "He will die as Bar Comas, your jeddak, sees fit, if at all," replied the young ruler, with emphasis and dignity.
